scripts.check:ui: bun run guardrails && bun run --cwd ui check
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run check:ui
scripts.release:check: bun run check && bun run check:fixtures
scripts.screenshot:milestone:ui-shell: bun run ui:build && bun ./scripts/capture-milestone-screenshot.mjs --slug m01-ui-shell-local --static-root ui/dist --static-path / --selector [data-screenshot="ui-shell"] --ready-selector [data-screenshot="ui-shell-canvas"] --delay-ms 1000
scripts.screenshot:dummy:drift: bun ./scripts/check-screenshot-drift.mjs --slug ui-dummy-current --baseline ./screenshots/ui-dummy-step-01.png --note "Upstream UI shell is not stable yet, so this drift check compares against the approved local dummy baseline."
